steps.title: Compare the slopes
steps.content: All four equations use the same intercept, $148.13$, so the slope determines which line matches the graph.

steps.title: Estimate from the graph
steps.content:
The best-fit line is near $x=10$ and $y=735$. Starting from the intercept, the estimated slope is
$$\frac{735-148.13}{10}=58.687$$So the slope is about $58.7$.

steps.title: Reject low slopes
steps.content: The slopes $0.02$ and $0.59$ are almost flat. The slope $48.61$ gives a value that is still too low near $x=10$.

steps.title: Check the matching slope
steps.content:
The slope $58.61$ gives
$$148.13+58.61(10)=734.23$$This is close to the point read from the line. The answer is D.
